case_title: AUDIT PRO INC. VS NASCO ENTERPRISES INC.

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT NASCO ENTERPRISES INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AUDIT PRO INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NASCO ENTERPRISES INC. $2,402.64 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,462.64, DEFENDANT WAIVED UNTIMELY SERVICE OF PROCESS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
UNTIMELY; DEFT, NASCO ENTERPRISES INC, WAS GIVEN LESS THAN 20 DAY NOTICE ON SUBSTITUTED SERVICE IN SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT NASCO ENTERPRISES INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,402.64 FILED BY AUDIT PRO INC. AS TO DEFENDANT NASCO ENTERPRISES INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-01-1996 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
